heading: Authorization of appropriations for Humphrey Institute and Dirksen Center
label: 2569 Authorization of appropriations for Humphrey Institute and Dirksen Center
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1978section 4(d) of Pub. L. 95–270section 2566 of this title

children.heading: Maximum amount for Institute
children.label: a Maximum amount for Institute
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums, not to exceed $5,000,000, as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of .section 2566 of this title

children.heading: Maximum amount for Center
children.label: b Maximum amount for Center
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums, not to exceed $2,500,000, as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of .section 2567 of this title

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: c Availability of funds
children.text: Funds appropriated pursuant to sections 2566 to 2569 of this title shall remain available until expended.
